form.formComment: Placed last time (29.83) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 3 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning easily by 5 lengths at this track (34.63) beating Midnight Queen in a Grade 5 on April 12 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and she needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins back-to-back. Had plenty of support last start when she won by half a length at this track (34.66) beating She's Peakin' in a Grade 5 on April 9. In winning form now and looks a major threat.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording four placings in a row, before finishing fourth (35.13) at this track last start. Drawn out wide and appears tested on latest effort.
